column1: # ESP32-S3 partition table for TomodachiDrawer firmware.
# - factory: 2MB app slot (the firmware itself; well clear of the ~600KB it actually needs
#   sized up so we don't have to revisit the layout if it grows).
# - tdld:    1MB custom data partition that the host UI writes the TDLD image into. The
#            firmware looks this up by name at runtime (esp_partition_find_first)
#            offset can change without rebuilding the UI's flash-write path.
# Layout fits in 4MB flash; on 8/16MB variants the trailing space is just unused.
